text_original: very bad app don't install it
text_zh: 非常糟糕的软件，不要安装
reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience you've had! I completely understand your frustration and apologize for the inconvenience. We want to make things right. Please share the specific issues you faced by emailing us at support@fantachat.ai. We are committed to improving and helping you!
reply_zh: 你好！对于您所经历的不愉快体验，我深表歉意！我完全理解您的沮丧，并为给您带来的不便表示歉意。我们希望能弥补这一切。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，与我们分享您遇到的具体问题。我们致力于不断改进并为您提供帮助！
